name: Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork Shoulder (or beef or chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a large pot and cover with water.
2. Add the Mexican seasoning.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the meat is tender (about 1 hour for beef or pork; about 45 minutes for chicken).
4. Be careful not to overcook the meat, as it will fall apart easily.
5. Drain the meat well.
6. Heat a large skillet with hot oil over medium-high heat.
7. Brown the meat quickly, then shred it using two forks.
8. Serve the carnitas in warmed tortillas, topped with fresh cilantro, chopped green onions, chopped tomatoes, salsa, and sour cream. Provide condiments in separate bowls so each person can customize their burrito.
